mapper.insert: WITH normalized_customers AS ( SELECT app_company_id, customer_id, -- 名字と名前の間の全角・半角スペースを削除 replace(replace(customer_name, ' ', ''), ' ', '') AS norm_name, replace(replace(customer_kana, ' ', ''), ' ', '') AS norm_kana, -- 電話番号から数字以外を除去 regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS norm_phone, regexp_replace(mobile_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS norm_mobile, -- ブロッキング用：カナの先頭2文字（例：「サト」） substring(replace(replace(customer_kana, ' ', ''), ' ', ''), 1, 2) AS kana_block, visit_count, last_visit_date FROM dwh.dim_customers WHERE app_company_id = #{companyId} AND is_deleted = false ), matched_pairs AS ( SELECT c1.customer_id AS id1, c2.customer_id AS id2, CASE -- 1. 電話番号が一致（最強：100点） WHEN (c1.norm_phone = c2.norm_phone AND c1.norm_phone != '') OR (c1.norm_mobile = c2.norm_mobile AND c1.norm_mobile != '') THEN 100 -- 2. カナが完全一致（95点） WHEN c1.norm_kana = c2.norm_kana AND c1.norm_kana != '' THEN 95 -- 3. 漢字氏名が完全一致（90点） WHEN c1.norm_name = c2.norm_name AND c1.norm_name != '' THEN 90 -- 4. 漢字氏名が曖昧一致（85点） ※1文字違いまで WHEN levenshtein(c1.norm_name, c2.norm_name) <= 1 AND c1.norm_name != '' THEN 85 -- 5. カナが曖昧一致（80点） ※1文字違いまで WHEN levenshtein(c1.norm_kana, c2.norm_kana) <= 1 AND c1.norm_kana != '' THEN 80 ELSE 0 END AS score FROM normalized_customers c1 JOIN normalized_customers c2 ON c1.app_company_id = c2.app_company_id AND c1.customer_id < c2.customer_id -- 自分自身との比較を避ける -- 【ブロッキング】電話番号一致、またはカナの先頭2文字が一致するペアのみに絞り込む AND ( (c1.norm_phone = c2.norm_phone AND c1.norm_phone != '') OR (c1.norm_mobile = c2.norm_mobile AND c1.norm_mobile != '') OR (c1.kana_block = c2.kana_block AND c1.kana_block != '') ) ), final_candidates AS ( -- スコア80点以上のものを対象に、visit_count等で正(target)と副(source)を決定 SELECT #{companyId} AS app_company_id, CASE WHEN cust1.visit_count > cust2.visit_count THEN cust2.customer_id WHEN cust1.visit_count < cust2.visit_count THEN cust1.customer_id WHEN (cust1.last_visit_date IS NOT NULL AND cust2.last_visit_date IS NOT NULL AND cust1.last_visit_date > cust2.last_visit_date) THEN cust2.customer_id WHEN (cust1.last_visit_date IS NOT NULL AND cust2.last_visit_date IS NOT NULL AND cust1.last_visit_date < cust2.last_visit_date) THEN cust1.customer_id ELSE (CASE WHEN cust1.customer_id > cust2.customer_id THEN cust2.customer_id ELSE cust1.customer_id END) END AS source_customer_id, CASE WHEN cust1.visit_count > cust2.visit_count THEN cust1.customer_id WHEN cust1.visit_count < cust2.visit_count THEN cust2.customer_id WHEN (cust1.last_visit_date IS NOT NULL AND cust2.last_visit_date IS NOT NULL AND cust1.last_visit_date > cust2.last_visit_date) THEN cust1.customer_id WHEN (cust1.last_visit_date IS NOT NULL AND cust2.last_visit_date IS NOT NULL AND cust1.last_visit_date < cust2.last_visit_date) THEN cust2.customer_id ELSE (CASE WHEN cust1.customer_id > cust2.customer_id THEN cust1.customer_id ELSE cust2.customer_id END) END AS target_customer_id, pairs.score FROM matched_pairs pairs JOIN dwh.dim_customers cust1 ON pairs.id1 = cust1.customer_id AND cust1.app_company_id = #{companyId} JOIN dwh.dim_customers cust2 ON pairs.id2 = cust2.customer_id AND cust2.app_company_id = #{companyId} WHERE pairs.score >= 80 ) INSERT INTO sys.merge_candidates ( app_company_id, source_customer_id, target_customer_id, similarity_score, status ) SELECT app_company_id, source_customer_id, target_customer_id, score, 'PENDING' FROM final_candidates ON CONFLICT (app_company_id, source_customer_id, target_customer_id) DO NOTHING
